rationale: Existing tests cover custom variable creation (dashboard-variables-setting.spec.js:405) and custom variables as parents (dashboard-variables-custom-parents.spec.js), but no existing spec tests the per-option default checkbox behavior, the save validation when no default is selected, the multi-select toggle auto-reset, or the exact default value resolution on the dashboard. The default-values-chain spec tests query_values default types ('all'/'custom'), not custom-type per-option defaults. A new spec focused on custom variable default value resolution is cleaner than appending 5+ new test cases to an already-large 537-line settings spec.
